authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model consistently and explicitly sided with the lower-authority internal technical sources (D2 and D3) over the CTO's public post-mortem (D1). It cited specific evidence—D3's 'DDoS indicators: Negative' and 'Ingress traffic: Flat,' and D2's real-time diagnosis of the memory leak—to justify dismissing the CTO's DDoS claim. It labeled D1 as the least reliable source and characterized it as a PR-driven narrative contradicted by all technical evidence.
